cve:IRM.Title: CVEnumIRMCoverageISO3166Digraph
cve:IRM.Description: All currently valid ISO-3166 digraphs(up to ISO update newsletter VI-11). Hence, this CVE has one less term than the corresponding ISO trigraph CVE, which has a code for WWW.

Term.Description: Congo, The Democratic Republic of the
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Macedonia, The former Yugoslav Republic of
Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
